steps.title: Use the purpose clue
steps.content: The presentation was intended to help attendees understand techniques of successful authors so they could improve their own work. The blank needs a phrase about gaining useful understanding.

steps.title: Choose the understanding phrase
steps.content: The phrase insight into means understanding of, which fits the purpose of learning techniques. B means lack of awareness, C suggests exceptions rather than understanding, and D means reluctance. The answer is A.
